items.headline: MRR dropped $5.4K in 48 hours. 60 active families, down from 68.
items.detail: Dashboard shows 60 active (was 68 in Monday's forecast). 9 paused. MRR fell from $47K to $41.6K. The churn rate flagged at 67.6% needs a Stripe audit - likely includes test subs and payment failures that aren't real churn. But 8 real families leaving in 2 days is a signal.

items.headline: No-show engine is live. 78 contacts getting 3-touch recovery - $27K upside.
items.detail: 79 no-shows found in HubSpot, zero previously recovered. 56 were Elliot's old leads. Touch 1 sent to 78 contacts. At 20% rebook and 63% close, that's ~10 new families for zero ad spend. Touch 2 fires in 3 days.

items.headline: Lead-to-booked rate jumped to 69% MTD. The router is working.
items.detail: 13 leads MTD, 9 booked (69.2%). Last week was 11% (11/100). Smart Lead Router went live yesterday - Anthony and Elliot are getting leads now instead of everything dumping on Tom. Still early but the signal is strong.

items.headline: Circle pilot has 68% parent buy-in before you've even asked properly.
items.detail: 19 of 28 surveyed parents said YES to Circle. 7 said maybe. Top concern is cost - pilot is free, so that's handled. Boys want financial literacy, business ideas & content creation. April 14-18 school holidays window is perfect.

items.headline: Anthony's OH score dropped from 4 to 2 in last 2 calls. Caving at close.
items.detail: Anthony is your best closer (40% close rate, 100% book rate) but SIEL scoring shows he caved on price in both recent calls (Sophie Cuzzy, Beck Reside). If this continues to call 6, Objection Handling becomes his primary gap alongside Emotional Labelling (2.2 avg).

leo_actions: No-show recovery engine running daily 10am - Touch 2 fires Friday for 78 contacts
Smart Lead Router distributing leads at 7:30am - Anthony/Elliot filling first, Tom gets overflow
Meta ads alert checking 3x daily - last alert: $76 CPBC (7d), CTR healthy at 4.6%
Mentor W2 batch (100 contacts) prepped for April 8 - approval-gated, Harry activates in MC
